'''dazara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sibopirdine|sibopirdine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sibopirdine|sibopirdine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dazara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzæræth|dæzæræth]] || [[word:dæzæræj|dæzæræj]] || [[word:dæzæræsh|dæzæræsh]] || [[word:dæzæræ|dæzæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazazarath|dazazarath]] || [[word:dazazaraj|dazazaraj]] || [[word:dazazarash|dazazarash]] || [[word:dazazara|dazazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazarath|dazarath]] || [[word:dazaraj|dazaraj]] || [[word:dazarash|dazarash]] || [[word:dazara|dazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazafrafth|dazafrafth]] || [[word:dazafrafj|dazafrafj]] || [[word:dazafrafsh|dazafrafsh]] || [[word:dazafraf|dazafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazaratha|dazaratha]] || [[word:dazaraja|dazaraja]] || [[word:dazarasha|dazarasha]] || [[word:dazaraka|dazaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazarath|dazarath]] || [[word:dazaraj|dazaraj]] || [[word:dazarash|dazarash]] || [[word:dazara|dazara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazarathal|dazarathal]] || [[word:dazarajal|dazarajal]] || [[word:dazarashal|dazarashal]] || [[word:dazarakal|dazarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazaraathatha|dazaraathatha]] || [[word:dazaraajaja|dazaraajaja]] || [[word:dazaraashasha|dazaraashasha]] || [[word:dazaraaka|dazaraaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazarathan|dazarathan]] || [[word:dazarajan|dazarajan]] || [[word:dazarashan|dazarashan]] || [[word:dazarakan|dazarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazarathaoro|dazarathaoro]] || [[word:dazarajaoro|dazarajaoro]] || [[word:dazarashaoro|dazarashaoro]] || [[word:dazarakaoro|dazarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
